title: On Coco's Farm
lrc:
[00:00.00]On Coco's farm the day begins,
[00:03.00]A cow steps out and moo, moo, moo.
[00:06.00]A sheep walks by and baa, baa, baa,
[00:09.00]A pig says oink — hello to you!
[00:12.00]On Coco's farm the friends all sing,
[00:15.00]Different voices, every one!
[00:18.00]A horse goes neigh, a duck goes quack,
[00:21.00]A chicken clucks beneath the sun.
[00:24.00]Cow and sheep and pig and horse,
[00:27.00]Duck and chicken — all together!
[00:30.00]On Coco's farm we sing along,
[00:33.00]Every voice and every feather.
[00:36.00]On Coco's farm we sing along,
[00:39.00]One big farm, one happy song!
